name: webdev
description: Monorepo for web development MCP tools

scripts.build: npm run build -w @winstonfassett/webdev-gateway && npm run build -w @winstonfassett/webdev-vite && npm run build -w @winstonfassett/webdev-nextjs
scripts.prepublish:check: npm run gateway:build && npm pack --dry-run -w @winstonfassett/webdev-gateway && npm pack --dry-run -w @winstonfassett/webdev-vite && npm pack --dry-run -w @winstonfassett/webdev-nextjs
scripts.publish:alpha: npm publish --tag alpha -w @winstonfassett/webdev-gateway && npm publish --tag alpha -w @winstonfassett/webdev-vite && npm publish --tag alpha -w @winstonfassett/webdev-nextjs
scripts.publish:all: npm publish -w @winstonfassett/webdev-gateway && npm publish -w @winstonfassett/webdev-vite && npm publish -w @winstonfassett/webdev-nextjs
scripts.release:alpha: npm run prepublish:check && npm run bump:alpha && npm run publish:alpha
scripts.release: npm run prepublish:check && bumpp apps/gateway/package.json packages/adapter-vite/package.json packages/adapter-nextjs/package.json && npm run publish:all
scripts.gateway:build: npm run build && npm --prefix apps/admin-svelte run build
scripts.gateway:start: nohup node apps/gateway/dist/cli.js > /tmp/webdev-gateway.log 2>&1 & disown; sleep 1; echo 'started (logs: /tmp/webdev-gateway.log)'
scripts.gateway:restart: npm run gateway:build && npm run gateway:stop && npm run gateway:start
